subject: Thank you for applying to Data Scientist
body: We received your application and our recruiting team is reviewing your profile.

subject: Schedule your technical interview
body: Please select a time for your technical interview loop with the data platform team.

subject: Complete your coding assessment
body: Your next step is to complete the SQL and Python take-home assessment by Friday.

subject: Written offer for Analytics Engineer
body: We are excited to extend an offer. The offer letter includes base salary and benefits details.

subject: Update on your application
body: Unfortunately, we will not be moving forward with your application for the Machine Learning Analyst role.

subject: Great speaking with you
body: Great speaking with you today. Can you send over a few times next week to continue the conversation?

subject: Security alert for repository
body: A dependency alert was detected in one of your repositories.

subject: This week in AI tools
body: Read our latest roundup of AI products, tutorials, and community events.

subject: Application status update
body: Your application status has changed to under review in the candidate portal.

subject: Data Analyst role
body: After review, we have decided to pursue other candidates for this opening.

subject: Confirm availability for next steps
body: Please confirm availability for next steps and submit references through the candidate portal.

subject: Your invoice is ready
body: Your monthly invoice for your developer tool subscription is ready.
